title: Better Cats!
body:
Better Cat Types!

Remodeled cats to better match their breeds, with tons of new features like random eye colors and tail lengths

Breeds:

  • Black: Solid Colour
  • British Shorthair: Scottish Fold mixes
  • Jellie: Exotic Shorthair
  • Tuxedo: Bi-Colour
  • White: Sphinx

Randomized Traits:

  • Hair Length: Short, Fluffy, and none
  • Tail Length: Normal and Bobtail
  • Whiskers: Short, Medium, and Long
  • Snout: Normal and Short nose

Eye Shapes and colors:

  • Eye Shapes: Narrow, Round, and Almond
  • Colors: Green, Yellow, Orange, Brown, Blue, Teal, Gray, and Heterochromia mixes

Tutorial

Due to OptiFine having inconsistent updates and features, its recommended to use mods: EMF & ETF instead

If using OptiFine, make sure to enable these settings for complete features:

Video Settings -> Quality -> Custom Entity Models: ON
Random Entities -> ON
Emissive Textures -> ON
In order to prevent texture issues, Better Cats! should be at the TOP of your Resource Pack list.
